name: LensGo Smoke S Handheld Fog Machine
description: Generate a unique atmosphere with the all-in-one LENSGO Smoke S, a 30W handheld, battery-powered, wireless mini fog machine designed for the creative needs of photographers, videographers, and content creators.

features.Key Features:: For Photography, Film, TV Special FX | Cinematic Atmosphere in Your Pocket | Dense Fog, Dry Ice, and Steam Effects | Up to 25 Minutes of Smoke Output | Battery-Powered, Battery Included | Includes Six Bottles of Smoke Fluid | Includes Wireless Remote Control | Includes Hose, Tube, and Nozzle Kit | Includes USB-C Charging Cable and Case
features.What's in The Box?: LENSGO Smoke S All-in-One Handheld Mini Fog Machine (30W) | Smoke S Handheld Smoke Machine | 6 x Bottle of Smoke Fluid (12 mL) | Wireless Remote | Silicone Hose | Hard Elbow | Hard Straight Tube | High-Pressure Nozzle | Liquid Smoke Filter | USB-C Charging Cable | Protective Case | Limited 1-Year Manufacturer Warranty
